# LLO Feedback — Turmeric Market Survey (SYNTHETIC)

**Produced by:** `llo-feedback` (Phase 6 Step 2)
**Collection method:** email prompts + optional phone follow-up

## ACE Test LLO 1

**What worked well:**
- The photo + MTN card workflow was easy to train FLWs on
- The OCS widget answered common FLW questions without us having to
  loop in — saved several hours across the pilot
- Daily cap blocks were clear and predictable

**What didn't work as well:**
- Some markets have irregular vendor layouts — the 5-per-market cap
  forced us to send FLWs back on a second day just for coverage
- The education message felt script-y in practice; FLWs adapted it
  after week 1

**Suggestions for next iteration:**
- Consider per-market caps that scale with market size
- Allow FLWs to flag their own "education message adapted" version for
  downstream content review

## ACE Test LLO 2

**What worked well:**
- Onboarding was fast (same-day after accepting the invite)
- Training materials were usable with minimal customization
- Payment schedule was predictable

**What didn't work as well:**
- MTN cards wore out faster than expected — we went through ~15 cards
  over 10 weeks across 8 FLWs
- The shininess question was the most-queried field; FLWs weren't
  always confident in their answer

**Suggestions for next iteration:**
- Ship laminated / weatherproof MTN cards
- Add a "not sure" option or a photo-reference row for the shininess
  question

## Common themes
- **MTN card durability.** Both LLOs raised this. Clear improvement
  target.
- **Shininess confidence.** FLWs found the subjective nature of the
  field hard. Consider either a visual reference or moving to a purely
  AI-assessed Layer B check rather than FLW-assessed Layer A.
- **Market cap rigidity.** Works for low-volume markets but awkward for
  larger ones.
